days.title: Coastal Welcome
days.summary: Land in Lima, settle into Miraflores, and walk the Malecon for Pacific views and sunset air.

highlights.title: Settle into Miraflores Accommodation
highlights.description: Check into your hotel or rental in Miraflores to acclimate and rest after your flight.

highlights.title: Walk the Malecon for Pacific Views
highlights.description: Stroll along the clifftop Malecon boardwalk to enjoy panoramic views of the Pacific Ocean.

highlights.title: Catch the Sunset at Parque del Amor
highlights.description: Visit Parque del Amor to watch the sunset and admire the famous mosaic walls.

photos.subject: Miraflores Malecon at sunset
photos.whyRelevant: Captures the iconic coastal views and sunset ambiance of day one.

photos.subject: Parque del Amor mosaic walls
photos.whyRelevant: Highlights a unique cultural landmark visited during the evening walk.

photos.subject: Pacific Ocean from Lima cliffs
photos.whyRelevant: Showcases the natural beauty visible from the Malecon.

days.title: Culture and Catacombs
days.summary: Visit Plaza de Armas and explore the San Francisco Monastery catacombs in the historic center.

highlights.title: Explore Plaza de Armas
highlights.description: Visit Lima’s historic main square to see colonial architecture and vibrant street life.

highlights.title: Tour San Francisco Monastery Catacombs
highlights.description: Take a guided tour of the monastery’s catacombs and learn about its history.

highlights.title: Sample Local Street Food Nearby
highlights.description: Try traditional snacks such as anticuchos or picarones near the historic center.

photos.subject: Plaza de Armas Lima
photos.whyRelevant: Shows the central historic hub visited on day two.

photos.subject: San Francisco Monastery catacombs
photos.whyRelevant: Highlights the unique underground site explored.

photos.subject: Peruvian street food Lima
photos.whyRelevant: Captures the culinary experience near the historic center.

days.title: Barranco and Food
days.summary: Explore Barranco street art, enjoy a classic Peruvian lunch, then fly to Cusco and transfer by van to the Sacred Valley.

highlights.title: Discover Barranco Street Art
highlights.description: Walk through Barranco’s colorful streets to admire vibrant murals and urban art.

highlights.title: Enjoy a Classic Peruvian Lunch
highlights.description: Dine at a local restaurant in Barranco to savor ceviche or lomo saltado.

highlights.title: Fly to Cusco and Transfer to Sacred Valley
highlights.description: Take an afternoon flight to Cusco and use a pre-arranged van for a smooth transfer to the Sacred Valley.

photos.subject: Barranco street art murals
photos.whyRelevant: Illustrates the vibrant art scene explored in the morning.

photos.subject: Peruvian ceviche dish
photos.whyRelevant: Represents the classic lunch enjoyed before departure.

photos.subject: Sacred Valley landscape
photos.whyRelevant: Depicts the destination reached after the flight and transfer.

days.title: Pisac Ruins
days.summary: Explore Incan terraces at Pisac and browse the market before a relaxed evening.

highlights.title: Explore Pisac Incan Terraces
highlights.description: Hike around the well-preserved agricultural terraces and learn about Incan farming techniques.

highlights.title: Browse Pisac Market
highlights.description: Shop for handmade textiles, ceramics, and souvenirs at the vibrant Pisac market.

highlights.title: Relax in the Evening at Your Accommodation
highlights.description: Unwind after the day’s activities with a quiet evening in the Sacred Valley.

photos.subject: Pisac Incan terraces
photos.whyRelevant: Shows the main archaeological site visited.

photos.subject: Pisac artisan market
photos.whyRelevant: Captures the colorful local market experience.

photos.subject: Sacred Valley sunset
photos.whyRelevant: Reflects the relaxing evening atmosphere.

days.title: Maras and Moray
days.summary: Visit the Maras Salt Mines and the circular terraces at Moray, with an optional ATV adventure.

highlights.title: Visit Maras Salt Mines
highlights.description: Walk among the terraced salt evaporation ponds and learn about traditional salt harvesting.

highlights.title: Explore Moray Circular Terraces
highlights.description: Tour the unique Incan agricultural experiment site with its concentric terraces.

highlights.title: Optional ATV Adventure
highlights.description: Older teens and adults can take an ATV tour around Maras for an adrenaline boost.

photos.subject: Maras salt mines terraces
photos.whyRelevant: Highlights the distinctive salt ponds visited.

photos.subject: Moray circular terraces
photos.whyRelevant: Shows the archaeological site’s unique design.

photos.subject: ATV tour Sacred Valley
photos.whyRelevant: Represents the optional adventure activity.

days.title: Ollantaytambo
days.summary: Tour one of the best-preserved living Incan towns and its fortress ruins.

highlights.title: Tour Ollantaytambo Fortress
highlights.description: Explore the well-preserved Incan fortress and learn its historical significance.

highlights.title: Wander Ollantaytambo Town
highlights.description: Stroll through the cobblestone streets of this living Incan town with traditional shops.

highlights.title: Visit Local Artisan Workshops
highlights.description: Discover local crafts and textiles by visiting artisan workshops in town.

photos.subject: Ollantaytambo fortress ruins
photos.whyRelevant: Captures the main archaeological highlight of the day.

photos.subject: Ollantaytambo town streets
photos.whyRelevant: Shows the charming living town environment.

photos.subject: Peruvian textiles Ollantaytambo
photos.whyRelevant: Highlights local craftsmanship encountered.

days.title: The Train Journey
days.summary: Ride from Ollantaytambo to Aguas Calientes, explore town, and prep for an early entry.

highlights.title: Train Ride to Aguas Calientes
highlights.description: Enjoy scenic views on the train journey from Ollantaytambo to the gateway town of Machu Picchu.

highlights.title: Explore Aguas Calientes Town
highlights.description: Walk around the small town, visit local markets, and relax before the Machu Picchu visit.

highlights.title: Prepare Gear for Early Machu Picchu Entry
highlights.description: Organize tickets, water, and clothing for an early start the next day.

photos.subject: Train Ollantaytambo to Aguas Calientes
photos.whyRelevant: Depicts the iconic journey to Machu Picchu.

photos.subject: Aguas Calientes town
photos.whyRelevant: Shows the town where travelers stay before visiting Machu Picchu.

photos.subject: Machu Picchu hiking gear
photos.whyRelevant: Represents the preparation needed for the next day’s early entry.

days.title: The Lost City
days.summary: Enter Machu Picchu early, with optional Huayna Picchu permits for fit hikers, then return by evening train toward Cusco.

highlights.title: Early Entry to Machu Picchu
highlights.description: Arrive at Machu Picchu at opening time to avoid crowds and enjoy the site in morning light.

highlights.title: Optional Huayna Picchu Hike
highlights.description: For fit hikers with permits, climb Huayna Picchu for panoramic views of the ruins.

highlights.title: Return by Evening Train to Cusco
highlights.description: Take the train back to Ollantaytambo and transfer to Cusco by van in the evening.

photos.subject: Machu Picchu sunrise
photos.whyRelevant: Captures the early morning experience at the Lost City.

photos.subject: Huayna Picchu summit view
photos.whyRelevant: Highlights the optional challenging hike.

photos.subject: Train returning to Cusco
photos.searchQuery: train Machu Picchu to Cusco Peru
photos.whyRelevant: Shows the journey back after the day’s exploration.

days.title: Settling Into the Heights
days.summary: Take a relaxed day at Plaza de Armas and ease into Cusco's higher elevation.

highlights.title: Relax at Plaza de Armas Cusco
highlights.description: Spend a leisurely day strolling the main square, enjoying cafes and people-watching.

highlights.title: Acclimate to Cusco’s Altitude
highlights.description: Take it easy and hydrate well to help your body adjust to the higher elevation.

highlights.title: Visit Nearby Artisan Shops
highlights.description: Browse local crafts and souvenirs around the Plaza de Armas at a relaxed pace.

photos.subject: Plaza de Armas Cusco
photos.whyRelevant: Shows the central gathering spot for day nine.

photos.subject: Cusco altitude acclimatization
photos.whyRelevant: Represents the importance of adjusting to the elevation.

photos.subject: Cusco artisan shops
photos.whyRelevant: Highlights local crafts available near the plaza.

days.title: Saqsaywaman Fortress
days.summary: Visit the monumental stone fortress above Cusco for sweeping views and dramatic family photos.

highlights.title: Visit Saqsaywaman Fortress
highlights.description: Explore the massive stone walls and terraces of this Incan fortress overlooking Cusco.

highlights.title: Take Panoramic Photos of Cusco
highlights.description: Capture sweeping views of the city from the fortress’s elevated vantage points.

highlights.title: Enjoy a Family Picnic on Site
highlights.description: Bring snacks to enjoy a relaxed picnic while soaking in the historic atmosphere.

photos.subject: Saqsaywaman stone walls
photos.whyRelevant: Illustrates the monumental Incan architecture visited.

photos.subject: Panoramic views Cusco from Saqsaywaman
photos.whyRelevant: Shows the scenic vistas available at the site.

photos.subject: Family picnic Saqsaywaman
photos.whyRelevant: Represents the relaxed family moment during the visit.

days.title: San Blas and Artisans
days.summary: Wander San Blas lanes, browse workshops, and try a chocolate-making session.

highlights.title: Wander San Blas Artisan Lanes
highlights.description: Explore narrow streets filled with artisan workshops and galleries.

highlights.title: Browse Local Handicrafts
highlights.description: Shop for unique souvenirs including textiles, ceramics, and jewelry.

highlights.title: Participate in a Chocolate-Making Session
highlights.description: Join a hands-on workshop to learn about Peruvian cacao and make your own chocolate.

photos.subject: San Blas artisan workshops
photos.whyRelevant: Highlights the creative atmosphere of the neighborhood.

photos.subject: Peruvian handicrafts San Blas
photos.whyRelevant: Shows the local artisan products available for purchase.

photos.subject: Chocolate-making workshop Cusco
photos.whyRelevant: Depicts the interactive cultural activity offered.

days.title: Adventure Day or Slow Day
days.summary: Choose an early Rainbow Mountain hike or split the group for spa time and museum browsing.

highlights.title: Early Rainbow Mountain Hike
highlights.description: Depart before dawn for a challenging hike to Rainbow Mountain, enjoying spectacular colorful landscapes.

highlights.title: Spa and Relaxation Option
highlights.description: For those skipping the hike, enjoy spa treatments to recover and rejuvenate.

highlights.title: Visit Cusco Museums
highlights.description: Explore museums such as the Inka Museum or Museo de Arte Precolombino for cultural enrichment.

photos.subject: Rainbow Mountain colorful landscape
photos.whyRelevant: Captures the iconic natural beauty of the optional hike.

photos.subject: Cusco spa interior
photos.whyRelevant: Represents the relaxing alternative to the hike.

photos.subject: Inka Museum Cusco
photos.whyRelevant: Highlights cultural activities available on a slow day.

days.title: Final Shopping
days.summary: Visit San Pedro Market for gifts and alpaca goods, then close with live Andean music over dinner.

highlights.title: Shop at San Pedro Market
highlights.description: Browse fresh produce, spices, and alpaca goods for authentic gifts and souvenirs.

highlights.title: Purchase Alpaca Textiles and Crafts
highlights.description: Select high-quality alpaca scarves, sweaters, and handicrafts from local vendors.

highlights.title: Enjoy Live Andean Music at Dinner
highlights.description: End the day with traditional music and dinner at a local Cusco restaurant.

photos.subject: San Pedro Market stalls
photos.whyRelevant: Shows the bustling market atmosphere.

photos.subject: Alpaca textiles Cusco
photos.whyRelevant: Highlights popular souvenirs available.

photos.subject: Live Andean music Cusco restaurant
photos.whyRelevant: Captures the cultural dining experience.

days.title: Departure
days.summary: Morning return flight from Cusco through Lima and onward home.

highlights.title: Prepare for Morning Flight from Cusco
highlights.description: Pack and check out early to ensure timely arrival at the airport.

highlights.title: Allow Comfortable Transfer Times
highlights.description: Schedule flights with ample connection time through Lima to avoid stress.

highlights.title: Reflect on the Trip During Transit
highlights.description: Use travel time to relax and reminisce about the Peru adventure.

photos.subject: Cusco airport departure
photos.whyRelevant: Represents the start of the journey home.

photos.subject: Flight connection Lima airport
photos.whyRelevant: Highlights the transfer point for international flights.

photos.subject: Traveler reflecting on trip
photos.whyRelevant: Symbolizes the end of the adventure and travel downtime.
